/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libnero_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libnero_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/nero_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/nero_msgs/msg/detail/nero_status_msg__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/nero_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/nero_msgs/msg/detail/pos_cmd__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/nero_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/nero_msgs/srv/detail/enable__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
